title: cyperus obtusus
intro: Cyperus obtusus, also known as the umbrella sedge or obtuse-flowered flat sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cyperus obtusus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Cyperus obtusus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
